description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive pattern of alternating black and marbled gray stripes running parallel across its top surface. The stripes are evenly spaced and extend the full width of the block, creating a visually striking, high-contrast appearance. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, modern look. The marbled texture within the gray stripes suggests a polished stone material, possibly granite or marble, while the black sections may be painted or made from a different stone. The block is thick and robust, with a flat top surface suitable for supporting weight. Its design is reminiscent of urban architectural features such as decorative barriers, seating, or edge markers in public spaces.
description: A rectangular stone block with alternating black and marbled gray stripes on top, and solid black sides, giving it a modern, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped top surface with the stripes appearing closely spaced and the solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view where the stripes are oriented vertically, making the marbled and black pattern more pronounced and widely spaced.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the striped top surface and solid black rear face visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the vertical striped pattern with clear separation between the marbled and black sections.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a leveled foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained, with no signs of erosion or discoloration.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
